top_signals.title: President von der Leyen visits Lithuania and reaffirms solidarity with Baltic countries.
top_signals.summary:
European Commission News Brussels, 29 May 2026 
Ursula von der Leyen, President of the European Commission, was in Lithuania this week to reaffirm Europe's solidarity with Baltic countries in the face of the...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
